## Feedback Type
<!-- Choose one -->

- [ ] Missing knowledge — agent doesn't know something it should
- [ ] New test pattern discovered
- [ ] Build/compile issue — wrong command or missing step
- [ ] Regression report issue
- [ ] Other improvement

<!-- What should the agent have said/done? -->
